summary.name: PEP
summary.oneLiner: A refreshing, light protein drink that fits your everyday life — wellness without effort, guilt, or gym vibes.
summary.positioningStatement: For wellness-focused, identity-driven people who want to make healthier everyday choices without sacrificing enjoyment, PEP is a premium protein drink that feels like a treat and fits effortlessly into brunches, coworking sessions, beach afternoons, and every moment in between. It is the drink that says 'I take care of myself' without shouting about it.
